name: platforme-cabinet-backend
description: Root package to run all microservices for the medical cabinet platform.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix authentification && npm install --prefix doctor && npm install --prefix recep && npm install --prefix notf_srv && npm install --prefix gateway
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:doctor" "npm run dev:recep" "npm run dev:notif" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:doctor" "npm run start:recep" "npm run start:notif" "npm run start:gateway"
